articles.title: 12 Team Building Tips for New Managers
articles.excerpt: New to managing a team? Use these 12 practical team building tips to build trust, set norms, and create momentum in your first 90 days.
articles.content:
Stepping into a new management role can feel overwhelming, especially when you’re inheriting a team with existing habits and dynamics. The good news: you don’t need a huge budget or a big offsite to start building trust.

Tip 1: Host a low-pressure introductions round where each person shares something beyond their job title.
Tip 2: Co-create team norms by asking what helps people do their best work.
Tip 3: Schedule a recurring 15-minute weekly check-in focused on wins and challenges.
Tip 4: Rotate meeting icebreakers so different voices lead.
Tip 5: Use short problem-solving activities to observe collaboration styles.
Tip 6: Pair new and experienced teammates for buddy-style micro-mentoring.
Tip 7: Run a values-mapping exercise to connect daily work to company goals.
Tip 8: Celebrate small milestones with quick appreciation rituals.
Tip 9: Introduce one simple feedback habit, like a +/Δ round after key projects.
Tip 10: Make space for anonymous input via pulse surveys.
Tip 11: Include remote teammates in every team building moment via hybrid-friendly formats.
Tip 12: End each month with a retrospective focused on "start, stop, continue" behaviors.

You don’t need to do all 12 at once. Start with one or two ideas that feel natural for your style and your team’s context, then build from there.

articles.title: 15 Quick Icebreakers for Hybrid Meetings
articles.excerpt: Keep both in-room and remote teammates engaged with these 15 easy hybrid-friendly icebreakers.
articles.content:
Hybrid meetings can easily slide into a one-sided experience if you don’t intentionally design for inclusion. These 15 icebreakers are built to work whether people are in the room, remote, or a mix of both.

We’ll cover name games, visual prompts, word clouds, and quick polls that take under 5 minutes each. You’ll also find facilitator notes on how to avoid common pitfalls, like side conversations in the room or tech delays on video calls.

articles.title: How to Plan a Chicago Offsite on a Budget
articles.excerpt: A step-by-step guide for HR and operations teams planning a cost-effective Chicago offsite without sacrificing impact.
articles.content: Chicago offers a huge range of venues and activities, but costs can add up quickly. In this guide, we break down how to choose a neighborhood, build a realistic budget, prioritize activities, and use half-day formats to stretch your dollars.

articles.title: Virtual Team Building Activities That Actually Work
articles.excerpt: From quick games to deeper workshops, here are proven virtual formats that keep remote teams engaged.
articles.content: Zoom fatigue is real, but so is the need for connection. This article walks through different types of virtual team building—icebreakers, skill-building workshops, and recurring micro-rituals—plus when to use each.

articles.title: A Manager’s Guide to Leading DEI Conversations
articles.excerpt: Practical steps for managers to facilitate inclusive conversations without turning them into one-off events.
articles.content: DEI is not just an HR initiative—it’s a leadership competency. This guide covers how managers can prepare themselves, frame conversations, respond to tough questions, and follow up with clear actions.

articles.title: In-Person vs Virtual: Which Event Type Is Right for Your Team?
articles.excerpt: Use this decision framework to choose between in-person, virtual, or hybrid team building formats.
articles.content: Should your next team event be in-person, virtual, or hybrid? We walk through key factors—budget, time zones, team size, accessibility, and outcomes—and provide sample agendas for each format.

articles.title: Escape Room vs Cooking Challenge: Which Is Better for Your Team?
articles.excerpt: Comparing two popular themed experiences—escape rooms and cooking challenges—across budget, collaboration style, and outcomes.
articles.content: Escape rooms and cooking challenges are two of the most-requested themed activities. We compare how each format supports problem solving, communication, and psychological safety, and share tips on which teams tend to thrive in each.

articles.title: Onboarding New Employees with Intentionally Designed Team Building
articles.excerpt: Make onboarding feel welcoming and structured with a 30-60-90 day team building plan.
articles.content: Intentional team building during onboarding can reduce ramp-up time and improve retention. We outline a timeline of activities tied to a new hire’s first 30, 60, and 90 days, including low-lift rituals and one deeper experience.

articles.title: DIY Team Building Kits for Hybrid Teams: A Buyer’s Guide
articles.excerpt: What to look for when choosing shipped experiences and DIY kits for distributed groups.
articles.content: DIY kits can be shipped to office and home addresses, making them ideal for hybrid teams. This guide walks through kit types—snack tastings, puzzles, creative projects—and what to check for in shipping, setup time, and facilitation options.

articles.title: Measuring the ROI of Your Team Building Program
articles.excerpt: A practical framework for tracking participation, engagement, and business impact from team building initiatives.
articles.content: Executives increasingly expect to see clear outcomes from culture investments. This article offers sample metrics and dashboards you can use to connect team building to engagement, retention, and performance indicators.

calculator_addons.name: Standard AV Package
calculator_addons.description: Projector or large display, microphones as needed, basic speakers, and on-site tech support for setup.

calculator_addons.name: Premium AV & Stage Lighting
calculator_addons.description: Upgraded sound system, multiple wireless mics, stage wash lighting, and dedicated AV technician for the full event.

calculator_addons.name: Boxed Lunch Catering
calculator_addons.description: Individually packaged lunches with standard, vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options; includes drinks and dessert.

calculator_addons.name: Team Photo & Highlight Video
calculator_addons.description: Professional photographer for 2 hours plus a 90-second edited highlight reel of your event.

calculator_addons.name: Roundtrip Group Transport
calculator_addons.description: Chartered bus or van transport from your office to the event venue and back, within 30 miles of city center.

diy_kits.name: Collaborative Mural Poster Kit
diy_kits.description: A giant poster puzzle your team colors and assembles together, revealing a surprise mural at the end. Ships with markers, poster panels, and facilitation prompts.

diy_kits.name: Global Snack Tasting Kit
diy_kits.description: Curated snacks from around the world with tasting guides, conversation prompts, and allergy-friendly options.

diy_kits.name: Portable Escape Room Puzzle Kit
diy_kits.description: A suitcase of physical puzzles, ciphers, and clues your team solves together in 60–90 minutes. Designed for conference rooms and offsites.

diy_kits.name: DIY Mocktail Mixology Kit
diy_kits.description: Shipped ingredients and recipe cards for three signature alcohol-free drinks, plus a tasting scorecard and facilitation guide.

diy_kits.name: Desk Plant Terrarium Kit
diy_kits.description: All the materials needed for each participant to build a low-maintenance glass terrarium, plus care instructions.

diy_kits.name: Story-Building Prompt Card Deck
diy_kits.description: A deck of illustrated prompts that teams use to build short stories together, designed for repeatable quick sessions.

diy_kits.name: Office Trivia Night Kit
diy_kits.description: Ready-made trivia decks, answer sheets, and host instructions for a 60–75 minute trivia session.

diy_kits.name: Wellness Care Package Kit
diy_kits.description: Self-care items like herbal tea, stress balls, journal, and guided reflection cards for each participant.

diy_kits.name: Team Cooking Spice Box
diy_kits.description: A curated set of spice blends with recipe suggestions and a facilitation guide for a shared cooking challenge.

events.title: Midtown Indoor Puzzle Quest
events.description: A fast-paced indoor team challenge in a Midtown Manhattan venue where teams rotate through themed puzzle stations, solving logic, visual, and word challenges to unlock a final meta-puzzle.
events.agenda_summary: Welcome & warm-up (30 min), rotating puzzle stations (90 min), debrief & awards (30 min).

events.title: SoHo Creative Collaboration Lab
events.description: A guided ideation and prototyping lab set in a light-filled SoHo studio. Teams move through high-energy exercises to generate and pitch new ideas.
events.agenda_summary: Energizer & framing (30 min), rapid ideation sprints (90 min), pitches & reflection (30 min).

events.title: Brooklyn Innovation Olympics (Indoor Edition)
events.description: Teams compete in creative and analytical challenges at different stations, earning points toward an Innovation Cup trophy.
events.agenda_summary: Welcome (20 min), multi-round innovation games (120 min), awards & photo time (40 min).

events.title: Remote Communication Essentials Workshop
events.description: An interactive virtual workshop where remote employees practice clear communication, expectation-setting, and feedback skills through role plays and breakout activities.
events.agenda_summary: Welcome & goals (15 min), communication frameworks (30 min), breakout role plays (45 min), action planning (30 min).

events.title: Culinary Team Cooking Challenge
events.description: Teams work with a professional chef to plan, cook, and plate a signature dish in a timed challenge, then present their creations to judges.
events.agenda_summary: Chef demo & safety (20 min), team menu planning (20 min), cooking challenge (75 min), tasting & awards (35 min).

events.title: Downtown Escape Room Adventure
events.description: Teams race against the clock to solve story-driven puzzles and escape themed rooms, building communication and trust under pressure.
events.agenda_summary: Check-in & briefing (15 min), escape experience (60 min), debrief (15 min).

events.title: Morning Icebreaker Mashup
events.description: A 45-minute sequence of high-energy icebreakers and connection prompts designed to kick off your offsite day.
events.agenda_summary: Welcome (5 min), rotating icebreakers (30 min), reflections & transitions (10 min).

events.title: Afternoon Mystery Collaboration Challenge
events.description: Teams uncover clues and solve a layered mystery that requires cross-team communication and resource-sharing.
events.agenda_summary: Story briefing (20 min), clue discovery rounds (100 min), debrief & insights (30 min).

events.title: Evening Rooftop Social Mixer
events.description: A relaxed evening gathering with facilitated light-touch networking prompts and music, ideal as a closing event after a day of sessions.
events.agenda_summary: Arrival & open networking (30 min), light facilitation & games (45 min), open social time (45 min).

events.title: Inclusive Leadership Foundations (DEI Workshop)
events.description: A practical, discussion-based DEI workshop that helps managers and ICs understand key concepts, practice inclusive behaviors, and commit to specific next steps.
events.agenda_summary: Framing & definitions (20 min), identity & bias exercises (30 min), scenarios in small groups (40 min), commitments & Q&A (15 min).

events.title: Advanced DEI Strategy Lab
events.description: A deep-dive working session for senior leaders and HR/People teams to build a multi-quarter DEI roadmap with metrics and governance.
events.agenda_summary: Current state assessment (30 min), goal-setting (45 min), roadmap design (60 min), measurement & governance (45 min).

events.title: San Francisco Waterfront Outdoor Scavenger Hunt
events.description: A hosted scavenger hunt along the San Francisco waterfront with location-based challenges, photo missions, and local trivia.
events.agenda_summary: Welcome & safety (15 min), scavenger hunt (110 min), scoring & awards (25 min).

events.title: Virtual Global Trivia Show
events.description: A high-energy hosted trivia experience with global culture, music, and pop culture rounds, run entirely over video.
events.agenda_summary: Welcome & tech check (10 min), three trivia rounds (60 min), lightning finale & wrap (20 min).

events.title: Virtual Mindfulness Micro-Retreat
events.description: A calming virtual session that combines guided meditation, light stretching, and reflection prompts to help teams reset.
events.agenda_summary: Arrival & grounding (10 min), guided practice (35 min), reflection & sharing (15 min).

events.title: Chicago Full-Day Offsite Package
events.description: A bundled full-day offsite in Chicago including a morning icebreaker, core afternoon activity, and light evening social, with optional catering and AV.
events.agenda_summary: Customizable full-day agenda including three activity blocks and optional add-ons.

events.title: NYC Premium Innovation Summit
events.description: A high-touch half-day summit featuring keynote facilitation, multiple breakout sessions, and live graphic recording.
events.agenda_summary: Keynote & framing (45 min), facilitated breakouts (120 min), report-outs & synthesis (45 min).

events.title: San Francisco Bay Cruise Social
events.description: An early evening bay cruise with light facilitation, appetizers, and panoramic views of the Golden Gate and city skyline.
events.agenda_summary: Boarding & welcome (20 min), cruise & networking (100 min), closing circle (20 min).

events.title: Virtual All-Hands Engagement Experience
events.description: A customizable virtual experience that blends short interactive segments—polls, breakout rooms, and mini-games—into your existing all-hands meeting.
events.agenda_summary: Customizable blocks integrated into your all-hands; typical runtime 60–90 minutes of engagement within a 2-hour meeting.
